summary: Completed backend testing of Telegram Bot Alert System with Russian language support. Alert engine, notification queue, and 31 alert codes working correctly.

minor_issues.issue: Telegram worker not initialized - returns 400 error
minor_issues.impact: Test message sending fails but this is expected behavior
minor_issues.note: This is expected because no chat_id is configured yet as mentioned in agent context

working_endpoints: /api/telegram/alerts/codes - Returns all 31 alert codes with Russian templates
/api/telegram/alerts/stats - Returns alert statistics and queue status
/api/telegram/alerts/emit - Successfully emits alerts with Russian data
/api/telegram/bot/status - Returns bot status (not running as expected)

action_item_for_main_agent: System is working correctly. The only 'failure' is Telegram worker not being initialized, which is expected since no chat_id is configured yet. All core alert engine functionality is working perfectly including Russian templates, alert emission, queue management, and statistics.
